subject: [PATCH v2 063/110] f2fs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: Author acknowledged that the patch needs to replace all uses of PRIino format macro with concrete %llu/%llx format strings, and confirmed that this has been done in the updated patch.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings (%llu/%llx) in the f2fs file system, as i_ino is now a u64 type and PRIino has been removed. The changes are made across various files in the f2fs codebase to ensure consistency and correctness in formatting inode numbers. This patch addresses a technical debt issue that arose from the change in inode number type and format macro removal.
